start_message:
We help people buy and sell things safely🤝

📝 Quick Deal Setup:
Use the /form command in any group to quickly create a deal!
form_message: Deal Setup Form Please provide the following details in this format: Buyer: @username Seller: @username Deal: Description of item/service Price: $amount Time: duration (optional) Example: Buyer: @buyer Seller: @seller Deal: Selling PS4 Price: $2000 Time: 2 hours If Time is not specified, the default duration of 1 hour will be set.
tos_prompt_message:
TERMS & CONDITIONS OF DEAL

Please reply to this message and provide all relevant rules and obligations regarding this transaction.

• Clearly outline expectations for both parties.
• State any specific rules, payment terms, return/refund policies, or time limits.
• Example:
  All payments must be made in advance. No refunds unless agreed by both parties. Both buyer and seller are expected to adhere to group guidelines.

Ensure that everything important to this deal is included for full clarity and transparency.
